title: Warak Enab Stuffed with Middle Eastern Spices
description: A delicious vegan version of traditional stuffed zucchini, featuring the flavors of the Middle East. A great side dish or light meal.

ingredients.name: Crusty bread, torn into small pieces

instructions: Cut the tops off the Warak Enab and scoop out some of the insides to make room for the filling.
In a bowl, mix together the hummus, sautéed onion, and chopped parsley.
Stuff each Warak Enab with the hummus mixture, dividing it evenly among the four zucchinis.
Place the stuffed zucchinis in a baking dish and brush with olive oil.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the zucchinis are tender and the filling is heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
